title: Senate Council (disambiguation)
content:
'''Senate Councils''' were the various councils of the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Galactic Alliance Senate]]s. It could refer to:

*[[Ministry Council]]
*[[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Defense Council]]
*[[Justice Council]]
*[[Council on Security and Intelligence]]
*[[Commerce Council]]
*[[Science and Technology Council]]

{{Disambig}}
